chapter_title.ar: بَابُ طَبَقَاتِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَ الرُّسُلِ وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 2 – The categories of the Prophets<sup>asws</sup>, and the Rasools<sup>as</sup>, and the Imams<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/286)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/286)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ سَادَةُ النَّبِيِّينَ وَ الْمُرْسَلِينَ خَمْسَةٌ وَ هُمْ أُولُو الْعَزْمِ مِنَ الرُّسُلِ وَ عَلَيْهِمْ دَارَتِ الرَّحَى نُوحٌ وَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ وَ مُوسَى وَ عِيسَى وَ مُحَمَّدٌ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ عَلَى جَمِيعِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Yahya Al Kash’amy, from Hisham, from Ibn Abu Yafour who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying, ‘The chiefs of the Prophetsas and the Mursilsas are five, and theyas are the Determined Ones (Ul Al-Azm) from the Rasoolsas, and upon themasws is the pole of the grind-mill (the central role) – Noahas, and Ibrahimas, and Musaas, and Isaas, and Muhammadsaww, may Salawat be upon themas and upon the entirety of the Prophetsas’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Muhammad ibn Yahya al-Khath‘ami from Hisham from abu Ya‘qub who has said the following “I heard abu ‘Abdallah saying, ‘The leaders and masters of the prophets and the messengers are five who are called ’ulul ‘Azm (people with determination) among the messengers who have the central role. They are Noah, Abraham, Moses, Jesus and Muhammad (s.a.).”
